# Legacy ANTLR4 Snowflake Parser Examples

These SQL files are mirrored from `bytebase/parser/snowflake/examples/`. They form **Corpus A** of the omni snowflake parser test suite — the regression baseline. Every file in this directory MUST parse cleanly under `omni/snowflake/parser`. Any regression here is a blocker for the migration.

When updating: re-copy from `bytebase/parser/snowflake/examples/` upstream. Do not edit these files in place.

Source commit: capture from upstream when synced.
